title: Webinar Series Part-3 From Telegraph to Optical Fibre “A Historical Perspective
subtitle: An engaging webinar that traced the evolution of communication technologies, from the telegraph era to modern optical fibre networks. The session combined historical insights with technological advancements, offering a unique and informative learning experience.
description:
Title of the event: Webinar, From telegraph to optical fibre- “A historical perspective on networks” 
 Objective: The objective of this event was to highlight the importance and evolution of communication networks over time. The webinar aimed to equip students and academicians with knowledge to explore research opportunities and foster innovation in wireless communication. It began by taking participants through the various advancements in communication systems, using references from paintings and movies to make the session more engaging and relatable.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Understand growth from telegraph to optical fibre.
Enhanced knowledge of network evolution and innovation.
